svg.aria-label: Accuracy against bytes per frame. The axonmesh cascade curve stays near mAP 0.39 to 0.45 from 0.04 to 11 KB per frame, while lowering JPEG quality collapses to 0.048 mAP at 3.2 KB. The two meet only at 11.2 KB, where every frame is sent.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, 'SF Mono', Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace

svg.text: BOTH AXES AT ONCE · COCO128, 320PX, YOLO11N → YOLO11M

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: one curve is above the other at every rate
